description_long: This is a long, sub-style sandwich placed on a white paper napkin. The sandwich features a golden-brown, slightly glossy bread roll that is split open to reveal a filling of sliced deli meats, likely ham or turkey, and a layer of white cheese. Some green vegetable matter, possibly lettuce or pickles, is faintly visible within the filling. The bread has a soft, pillowy texture with subtle scoring on the top. The sandwich is presented simply, without any visible condiments or elaborate garnishes, and the napkin underneath suggests it is ready for casual consumption in an urban setting.
description: A long sandwich with deli meat and cheese filling, served on a golden-brown roll atop a white paper napkin. The sandwich appears fresh and ready to eat.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the sandwich, with visible layers of meat and cheese inside the split roll.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the cross-section of the sandwich, with the filling and bread thickness clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the back of the sandwich, mostly bread with less filling visible.
description_view_3: End-on view from the other side, again showing the cross-section and the arrangement of the filling.
